params.name: The Last Judgment
params.description:
On Dec 21, 1541 AD, Michelangelo completed the fresco of The Last Judgment in Sistine Chapel.
The fresco is a masterpiece of the Italian Renaissance painter Michelangelo. There are over 300 figures in it, covering the whole altar wall of the Sistine Chapel in Vatican City, including the dead rise and descend to their fates, as judged by Christ who is surrounded by prominent saints, contrasting an ordered, harmonious heavenly world above with the tumultuous events taking place in the earthly z …
